metadata.name: Inquiry on Best Practices for Team Collaboration

description: A team manager asks for advice on the best way to configure the product for collaboration between their design and development teams.

nodes.task_description: Understand the customer's specific workflow and collaboration goals.

expected_outcome.value: Agent asks clarifying questions to understand the team's needs.

nodes.task_description: Search the internal knowledge base for best practice guides related to 'design-to-dev handoff'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a relevant guide and a case study from a similar company.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the key recommendations from the guide, explaining how to set up specific project boards, user roles, and integrations to facilitate their workflow.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides actionable, expert advice tailored to the customer's use case.
